Deep Dey — Software Architect and Class 12 Student

My journey in JEE preparation, system architecture, and practical AI engineering

I am building this portfolio to document my long-term learning journey, development discipline, and real-world execution through products and systems.

Alongside my JEE preparation, I stay focused on building resilient, high-performance websites and software tools with production-oriented architecture.

My AI work is practical: I turn concepts into usable features, optimize reliability, and ship improvements that solve meaningful user problems.

This website represents my projects, technical growth, and continuous iteration across frontend, backend, analytics, and platform quality.

I continue learning every day through coding, debugging, and systems thinking, with a goal to merge academics and engineering excellence.

About this website: This portfolio is maintained by Deep Dey and includes project showcases, feature references, legal information, and profile pages.

The Origin Timeline

Milestones & Pivot Points

Aug 14, 2020

The Digital Genesis

Content Creation Era

Started my first YouTube channel, marking the beginning of my deep dive into the digital world and content ecosystems.

2023

A Chapter Closes

Resilience Phase

YouTube channel termination after 3 years. A massive learning phase focused on technical resilience and pivoting toward core engineering.

Early & Late 2025

Academic Pivot & Coding

Madhyamik & Skills

Passed 10th Boards with 93% in Mathematics. Transitioned to intense software development, mastering AI Prompting, React, and Scalable Architecture.

April 9, 2026

The Academic Hiatus

JEE Advanced Focus

Paused active software engineering to dedicate 100% bandwidth to JEE 2027 and the IIT KGP CSE target.

Active Phase
2027

The Target reached

IIT Kharagpur CSE Class of 2031

Entering the elite Computer Science department at IIT KGP. A new era of technical rigor and architectural mastery begins.

2031

Architect of Scale

B.Tech Graduation

Entering the industry as a seasoned Architect, building distributed systems and AI-driven infrastructures.

2035

Tech Leader / Innovator

Future Horizon

Leading global infrastructure projects, pushing the boundaries of AI integration and system stability for the next generation.
